title: hieracium vasconicum subsp. lactescens
intro: Hieracium vasconicum subsp. lactescens, also known as Hieracium lactescens, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus of flowering plants in the dandelion family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily used as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent. The health benefits of Hieracium lactescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as arthritis and gastrointestinal disorders. Hieracium lactescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
